meaning: v.比较,相比,比喻 n.比较
examples: The point of the lesson is to compare the two countries.
Managers analyse their company's data and compare it with data on their competitors.
Scientists are attempting to compare features of extinct animals with living analogues.
The good thing, if you compare it with the past, will probably be rather short.
Since 1995 FORBES has asked its columnists to compare the performance of their picks with the market.
